title: SQL: Update with correlated subselect
poc: create table t1 (id1 int, val1 varchar(255));
create table t2 (id2 int, val2 varchar(255));
select val2  from t2\r\n where id1 = id2)\r\n where id1 in (select id2 from t2);
key_bug_features: Update with correlated subselect in SQL query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id1 INT PRIMARY KEY, val1 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id2 INT PRIMARY KEY, val2 VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1 (id1, val1) VALUES (1, 'value1'), (2, 'value2'), (3, NULL);
UPDATE t1 SET val1 = (SELECT val2 FROM t2 WHERE t1.id1 = t2.id2) WHERE id1 IN (SELECT id2 FROM t2 WHERE val2 IS NOT NULL);
